title: Freedom for Farmers Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
subjects: Department of Health and Human Services
crs_summary: Freedom for Farmers Act of 2025 This bill abolishes the Agency for Toxic Substances and Disease Registry. Currently, this agency, which is part of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), investigates and responds to environmental exposures to hazardous substances in communities. The bill requires HHS to transfer authority regarding certain national disease and toxic exposure registries to another appropriate HHS entity.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
